title: DNS Baseline Snapshot
description: Snapshot of every Squarespace DNS record for the cutover domain at a given point in time. Used as the source-of-truth for rollback and as the baseline for the email-continuity delta check.

domain_apex.description: Bare domain (no scheme, no www). E.g., 'worldgeno.me'.

captured_by.description: Agent persona or operator name + tooling version. E.g., 'agent_berthier via 02_baseline_dns.ts@1.4.0'.

vercel_project_id.description: Vercel project ID this cutover targets. Captured for cross-reference.

records.description: All DNS records at the registrar for the domain. Capture every record type the registrar exposes — do not filter.

value.description: Record target value (IP for A/AAAA; hostname for CNAME/ALIAS/MX/NS; quoted-string for TXT including SPF/DKIM/DMARC; priority+target for MX/SRV).

priority.description: Priority for MX/SRV records; null for other types.

registrar_id.description: Squarespace-internal record ID if captured (used for targeted rollback).

notes.description: Free-text annotation (e.g., 'Google Workspace MX', 'M01 baseline match').

checksum.description: SHA-256 of the canonical-serialized records array. Used to detect drift between successive snapshots.
